purpose: Broad-looking same-account root trust with MFA condition must not produce false validated admin reachability.
description: Alice has sts:AssumeRole permission to an admin-equivalent role. The role trust allows same-account root but requires MFA, which this benchmark does not prove satisfied.

ground_truth.reasoning: The trust policy requires aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent=true. The benchmark session does not prove Alice satisfies that condition, so IAMScope must not claim validated admin reachability.

benchmark_contract.contract_note: A blocked or inconclusive target outcome is acceptable today; a validated admin_reachability finding for alice -> broad-conditioned-admin is benchmark-failing overclaim.

benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove runtime MFA satisfaction checking.
It does not prove broad trust handling for every condition shape.
